text:
-- I forget to add pr number.

Hi, Martin.

Thank you for update. Please note that after updating py-snmp4 suite
patch to net-mgmt/noc should be applied to fix dependency. Until
that it will remains broken. I wrote about this in addition to ports/155713,
there is the patch:

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?prp=155713-2-txt&n=/Makefile.diff.txt

Oh.... it somehow ucked up. I attached it to this message directly.

-- 
Regards,
Ruslan
